title: cacalia lettermannii
intro: Cacalia lettermannii, also known as Lettermann's cacalia or American button lettuce, is a type of flowering plant native to the United States and Canada. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cacalia lettermannii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs for its herbal preparations.
